name: requirement-analysis
description: Evaluations for requirement-analysis skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user asks to analyze or validate requirements

prompts.reason: Exact trigger phrase listed in skill description

prompts.input: Help me with requirement analysis for this new feature
validate requirements for the payment module
Break down these complex requirements into actionable items
I need to analyze user needs and validate the product idea before we start building
prompts.reason: Analyzing user needs and validating product ideas is a listed use case

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for implementation or technical tasks

prompts.input: What are the system requirements to run this software?
prompts.reason: Asking about system/hardware requirements, not product requirement analysis

prompts.input: Write a user story for the dashboard
prompts.reason: User story creation is a different skill (user-story), not requirement analysis
